prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response: The Lur from Morning's Scratcher was far from an enjoyable experience. Waking Up, as the manufacturers are calling it, arrived in a shoddy cardboard package, with little in the way of instructions or wrapping materials. Powering on was glacial, with the sun's rays taking far too long to rise and pierce through windows. Once functioning, the device showed little care for user preferences, rudely jerking the sleeper from their peaceful slumber. Even the most basic features, like music playlists, required several fumbling attempts to get right. An utter snooze-fest in every way imaginable. Avoid if you cherish your dreams, morning person or not.
